title: Gray Baby Capsule Schema
description: Fixture-only narrative provenance schema for replayable Gray Baby and Gray Child story objects. This schema does not establish truth, authority, cryptographic provenance, family history, or repository canon.

gb_id.description: Unique capsule identifier. Identity is local to the narrative fixture unless separately bound by evidence.

label.description: Narrative sequence label: Gray Baby or Gray Child.

parent_id.description: Parent capsule UUID, or null for a declared narrative root. Null must remain an explicit visible gap/root condition and must not trigger inferred ancestry.

narrative_blob.description: Human-supplied story content preserved without machine promotion or classification.

origin_context.description: Human-supplied context describing where the narrative object begins or how it entered the replay corridor.

timestamp.description: Fixture-supplied narrative timestamp. It is not an observed repository, chain, or execution timestamp unless independently evidenced elsewhere.

is_simulated.description: Hard lock preventing narrative fixtures from being represented as repository canon or real-world observations.
